creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
OK, after manually copying puppet.rb from puppetlabs-puppet-7.9.0_GH0.tar.gz to /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb sysutils/puppet7 is working as expected, confirming that this seems to be the only problem with this port/package.

I still have no idea why puppet.rb is absent from the package:

# pkg info -l puppet7 | grep '2.7/puppet.rb'
(yields no results)

VS.

# pkg info -l puppet6 | grep '2.7/puppet.rb'
	/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.7/puppet.rb
